title: Multilingual NLP Pipeline
excerpt: A production-grade NLP pipeline supporting 12+ languages with custom tokenisation, named-entity recognition, and transformer-based classification — served via FastAPI with Redis caching.

title: Distributed Task Engine
excerpt: An event-driven microservices system built with Django, Celery, and RabbitMQ — handling 50k+ daily background tasks with full observability via Prometheus and Grafana.

title: RAG-Powered Knowledge Base
excerpt: A Retrieval-Augmented Generation system that indexes internal documentation and answers developer queries using sentence embeddings, FAISS, and an LLM backend — reducing search time by 70%.
